meaning: adj.平行的,相同的,类似的,并联的n.平行线,平行面,类似,相似物v.相应,平行
examples: The road runs parallel to the river.
The parallel lines appear to diverge.
Remsen Street is parallel with Montague Street.
The important point is that many drivers prefer to parallel park themselves, thank you.
The growing friendship with Mr Koch ran parallel with better relations with New York's other Jews.
